name: abas ERP API
what_it_does: abas ERP REST API for mid-market manufacturing and distribution companies with production planning, inventory, sales order management, and financial accounting. Enables AI agents to manage sales order and quotation processing for automated order-to-cash workflow, handle production order creation and scheduling for manufacturing operations automation, access inventory and warehouse management for stock optimization automation, retrieve purchasing and supplier management for procurement workflow automation, manage customer and project management for professional services integration, handle financial accounting and cost center management for manufacturing cost control, access BOM (bill of materials) and routing management for production engineering automation, retrieve quality management and inspection lot tracking for manufacturing quality automation, manage delivery scheduling and shipment tracking for logistics operations, and integrate abas with EDI, MES (manufacturing execution systems), and IoT platforms for Industry 4.0 manufacturing automation.
use_cases: Processing sales orders from order management agents
Planning production from manufacturing scheduling agents
Managing inventory from warehouse optimization agents
Tracking quality from manufacturing QC agents
not_for: Large enterprise manufacturing needing SAP S/4HANA scale
Process manufacturing (pharma, chemicals) with batch traceability
Retail and consumer goods with POS integration
best_when: A mid-market manufacturing or distribution company (50-1,000 employees) in Europe or North America wanting AI agents to automate order processing, production planning, inventory management, purchasing, and quality control within the abas ERP platform.
avoid_when: ABAS ERP CUSTOMIZATION COMPLEXITY: abas ERP is highly customizable with abas Basic programming language; automated API integrations for heavily customized abas installations must account for customer-specific field mappings and business logic; standard API may not expose all customer-specific customizations. GDPR EMPLOYEE AND CUSTOMER DATA PROCESSING: Automated abas ERP processing of EU employee time, payroll, or customer personal data requires GDPR lawful basis and data processing agreement with abas; automated EU PII processing without lawful basis documentation creates GDPR violation. PRODUCTION ORDER AUTOMATION AND MES ACCURACY: Automated production order confirmation from abas without MES validation of actual production quantities creates inventory discrepancy; automated good receipt posting from production without physical inventory count creates stock valuation error. FINANCIAL PERIOD CLOSE POSTING GATE: Automated financial transactions posting in abas must respect period close status; automated GL entries in closed financial period require period re-opening and audit trail; implement period-open check before automated financial posting.

auth.notes: abas ERP uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Karlsruhe, Germany HQ (ABAS Software AG). Founded 1980. Private company. 4,000+ mid-market manufacturing customers in 45 countries. Particularly strong in Europe (DACH region) and North America. ERP12 cloud platform with REST API (abas API). Industry 4.0 and IoT integration focus. Competes with Infor CloudSuite, Epicor Kinetic, and proALPHA for mid-market manufacturing ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user annual subscription with implementation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per concurrent user; cloud (ERP12) and on-premise options; implementation professional services required
pricing.notes: Karlsruhe Germany. Private, ABAS Software AG. Founded 1980. 4,000+ mid-market manufacturing customers, 45 countries. ERP12 cloud platform. Per-concurrent-user annual subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; production and financial transaction APIs throttled for data integrity

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — PRODUCTION AND ORDER EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: abas ERP does not support native webhooks; production order status, sales order changes, and inventory events require scheduled polling; implement polling aligned with manufacturing shift cadence for production monitoring

ABAS BASIC CUSTOMIZATION FIELD MAPPING: Heavily customized abas installations use abas Basic custom fields and business logic not exposed by standard REST API; automated integrations must be configured against customer-specific abas customization documentation; standard API field mapping may differ from customer's abas instance

GDPR LAWFUL BASIS FOR EU EMPLOYEE AND CUSTOMER DATA: Automated abas processing of EU employee HR and payroll data or EU customer personal data requires documented GDPR lawful basis and DPA with abas; automated EU PII access without lawful basis creates GDPR violation for DACH-region manufacturer using abas

Production order confirmation without MES reconciliation — automated production order good-receipt posting in abas from planned quantities without MES-confirmed actual production creates inventory overstatement; implement actual quantity reconciliation step before automated inventory posting

Financial period close status check — automated abas financial posting for GL entries, invoices, or journal entries must check period-open status; automated posting to closed accounting period requires period re-opening and creates audit trail disruption; implement period-status pre-check in all automated financial transaction workflows

abas ERP12 cloud vs on-premise API differences — abas offers both ERP12 (cloud) and classic on-premise deployment; ERP12 REST API and on-premise AAOS API have different authentication and endpoint structures; verify deployment type before API integration; new integrations should target ERP12 REST API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mid-market manufacturing ERP. ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. EU/US. Production, inventory, and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Manufacturing ERP. ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. EU/US. Production, inventory, and financial data.
